hyperedges.label: Core Gameplay Loop — Accept, Play, Earn, Spend

nodes.label: Fragile Modifier
nodes.rationale: Tightens all precision windows by 40% on Premium+ jobs. Forces real investment in protection perks. The cost of overreaching is built into the modifier itself.

nodes.label: Bolt vs Bespoke Perk Tiers
nodes.rationale: Bolt perks are reliable and accessible; Bespoke are conditional and stronger. Bespoke conditions like 'Good or better only' mean skilled players benefit more — the system rewards competence, not just spending.

nodes.label: Money Sinks
nodes.rationale: Perk charges are the primary money sink. Keeps high earners spending continuously rather than accumulating idle wealth.

nodes.label: Design Pillars
nodes.rationale: Four pillars: (1) Skill has a ceiling, loadout raises the floor; (2) Every job is a bet; (3) Reputation is earned not bought; (4) The board is shared, the grind is personal.

nodes.label: Minigame Common Interface
nodes.rationale: All minigames share Start(container,config)->GetResult()->Cleanup() API. Results: FAIL->PASS->GOOD->PERFECT. Worst result in chain becomes final result.

nodes.label: Compound Failure Cost Design
nodes.rationale: Failure costs: rep loss + tool charges lost + no pay + time lost. No direct money deduction — charge burn scales with loadout investment. Intentional design so riskier equipped attempts cost more to fail.

hyperedges.label: Core Gameplay Loop — Accept, Play, Earn, Spend
